description: Phase 5: Early Access Release — Close all PRD gaps, add collision, expand building/combat systems, polish UI, optimize performance, and prepare for release

userStories.title: Tile collision for player movement
userStories.description: As a player, I want to be blocked by water, deep water, and lava tiles so that the world feels solid and exploration requires finding paths around obstacles.
acceptanceCriteria: Player cannot walk onto Water, DeepWater, or Lava tiles
Collision check uses the chunk tile data at the player's target position
Player slides along impassable tile edges instead of stopping dead
Movement still works normally on all walkable tile types
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check TileType::is_walkable() in player_movement system. Convert player target position to chunk coords, look up tile, reject movement into non-walkable tiles.

userStories.title: Building collision blocks player and enemies
userStories.description: As a player, I want placed walls and closed doors to block movement so that I can build defensive structures.
acceptanceCriteria: Player cannot walk through WoodWall, StoneWall, or closed WoodDoor buildings
Enemies cannot path through walls or closed doors
Open doors allow passage for both player and enemies
Floors and roofs do not block movement
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add collision check in player_movement and enemy_ai systems. Query all Building entities, check AABB overlap for walls/closed doors.

userStories.title: Stone and metal building tiers
userStories.description: As a player, I want to build with stone, brick, and metal materials so that my structures match higher crafting tiers.
acceptanceCriteria: BuildingType enum includes StoneFloor, StoneWall, StoneDoor, StoneRoof, MetalWall, MetalDoor
Each new type has a unique color, required item, and salvage table
Q key cycles through all building types when in build mode
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Extend BuildingType enum. Add ItemType variants for new building pieces. Add crafting recipes at Forge (stone) and AdvancedForge (metal) tiers.

userStories.title: Stone and metal building recipes
userStories.description: As a player, I want crafting recipes for stone and metal building pieces at the appropriate crafting stations.
acceptanceCriteria: StoneFloor recipe at Forge tier: 4 StoneBlock
StoneDoor recipe at Forge tier: 6 StoneBlock, 2 IronIngot
StoneRoof recipe at Forge tier: 6 StoneBlock
MetalWall recipe at AdvancedForge tier: 4 SteelAlloy, 2 IronIngot
MetalDoor recipe at AdvancedForge tier: 6 SteelAlloy
New ItemType variants exist for all new building pieces
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add ItemType variants, display_name entries, max_stack (64), and recipes to CraftingSystem::new().

userStories.title: Shield damage reduction in combat
userStories.description: As a player, I want shields to reduce incoming damage when equipped so that defensive gear matters.
acceptanceCriteria: WoodShield and IronShield have shield_value() method returning damage reduction (2 and 5 respectively)
ArmorSlots gets a new shield: Option<ItemType> field
R key equips shields (detected via is_shield() method)
total_armor() includes shield value
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add shield_value() to ItemType, is_shield() check, ArmorSlots.shield field, update equip_armor system.

userStories.title: Ranged combat with bow and arrows
userStories.description: As a player, I want to shoot arrows at enemies when holding a bow so that I can attack from a distance.
acceptanceCriteria: Left-click while holding WoodBow spawns a Projectile entity moving toward nearest enemy or cursor direction
Projectile consumes 1 Arrow from inventory per shot
Projectile deals 8 damage on contact with an enemy then despawns
Projectile despawns after traveling 300px or 2 seconds
No arrows in inventory = no shot fired
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add Projectile component with velocity, lifetime. Add projectile_movement and projectile_hit systems. Check selected item is WoodBow in player_attack.

userStories.title: Proximity-based crafting station detection
userStories.description: As a player, I want crafting to check if I'm near a placed crafting station rather than just having it in my inventory.
acceptanceCriteria: Crafting recipes requiring Workbench only available when player is within 48px of a placed Workbench building
Same proximity check for Forge, Campfire, AdvancedForge, AncientWorkstation
Placed crafting stations are Building entities with a CraftingStation component
Building system spawns CraftingStation component when placing station items
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add CraftingStation { tier: CraftingTier } component. Modify handle_crafting_input to query placed station buildings near player instead of checking inventory.

userStories.title: Coastal and Mountain unique boss types
userStories.description: As a player, I want unique boss encounters in Coastal and Mountain biomes instead of the generic StoneGolem fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: New EnemyType::TidalSerpent for Coastal biome boss with 240hp, 16 damage, aquatic color
New EnemyType::MountainTitan for Mountain biome boss with 260hp, 17 damage, grey/brown color
boss_for_biome returns TidalSerpent for Coastal and MountainTitan for Mountain
Each boss has unique loot drops: CoralEssence and TitanBone items
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add 2 new EnemyType variants, stats, 2 new ItemType drops, update boss_for_biome and spawn_dungeon_boss loot tables.

userStories.title: Dungeon entrances in all biomes
userStories.description: As a player, I want to find dungeon entrances in every biome so that all areas have underground content to explore.
acceptanceCriteria: Dungeon entrance spawning no longer limited to Mountain/Volcanic/CrystalCave
All 9 biomes can spawn dungeon entrances at ~0.5% tile probability
Entrance passes the chunk's biome to spawn_entrance_with_biome
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Remove the biome filter in spawn_chunk_objects. Move dungeon entrance check before the biome match block so all biomes participate.

userStories.title: Fog of war on minimap
userStories.description: As a player, I want unexplored areas on the minimap to be hidden so that exploration feels rewarding.
acceptanceCriteria: New ExploredChunks resource tracks which chunk positions the player has visited
Chunks within 2 chunks of the player are marked as explored
Minimap pixels for unexplored chunks render as dark/black instead of terrain colors
Explored chunks persist across sessions (saved with game state)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add ExploredChunks(HashSet<IVec2>) resource. Update update_minimap to check explored set. Mark chunks explored in manage_chunks.

userStories.title: Bed spawn point system
userStories.description: As a player, I want to craft and place a bed that becomes my respawn point so that death doesn't always send me to world origin.
acceptanceCriteria: New ItemType::Bed with Hand crafting recipe (WoodPlank x6, PlantFiber x4)
Bed is a placeable BuildingType that can be placed via build mode
SpawnPoint resource stores the last bed position (default: world origin)
Interacting (E key) with a placed bed sets it as spawn point with HUD feedback
Death respawn uses SpawnPoint position instead of hardcoded world origin
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add Bed component, SpawnPoint resource, update death.rs to use SpawnPoint, add bed interaction in building.rs.

userStories.title: Chest storage UI
userStories.description: As a player, I want to interact with placed chests to store and retrieve items so that I can manage my inventory.
acceptanceCriteria: Placed Chest building has a ChestStorage component with 18 inventory slots
E key near a chest opens a chest UI panel showing chest contents
Player can transfer items between inventory and chest via number keys
Chest contents persist (stored in the ChestStorage component)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add ChestStorage component with slots Vec. Add chest_interaction system, chest HUD rendering. Place chest via build mode.

userStories.title: Biome-specific enemy loot drops
userStories.description: As a player, I want enemies to drop biome-relevant resources instead of only Stone and PlantFiber.
acceptanceCriteria: Forest enemies drop Wood and Berry
Desert enemies drop CactusFiber and Sand
Tundra enemies drop IceShard
Volcanic enemies drop Sulfur and ObsidianShard
Fungal enemies drop MushroomCap and Spore
Swamp enemies drop Reed and Peat
Crystal Cave enemies drop CrystalShard
Mountain enemies drop IronOre and Stone
Coastal enemies drop PlantFiber and Stone
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Replace hardcoded drop in player_attack with loot_for_biome() function. Determine biome from enemy position and chunk lookup.

userStories.title: Expanded save/load for all game state
userStories.description: As a player, I want save/load to persist buildings, tech tree, armor, lore, explored chunks, and spawn point.
acceptanceCriteria: Buildings are saved and restored (position, type)
TechTree unlocked nodes persist across save/load
ArmorSlots equipped items persist
LoreRegistry collected entries persist
ExploredChunks set persists
SpawnPoint position persists
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Extend SaveData struct in saveload.rs with new fields. Add Serialize/Deserialize derives to relevant types. Query buildings on save, spawn them on load.

userStories.title: World seed configuration
userStories.description: As a player, I want to specify a world seed or get a random one so that I can share interesting worlds.
acceptanceCriteria: WorldState seed is randomized on new game instead of hardcoded 42
Seed is displayed in the HUD status area
Seed is saved and restored with save/load
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use rand to generate seed in WorldState::new. Save seed in SaveData. Show seed in update_status_hud.

userStories.title: Procedural ruins with loot chests
userStories.description: As a player, I want to discover procedurally generated ruins on the surface that contain loot chests and journal pages.
acceptanceCriteria: New RuinStructure WorldObjectType spawns as a cluster of 4-8 stone wall/floor tiles
Ruins spawn at ~0.3% probability per chunk in Forest, Desert, Swamp, Mountain biomes
Each ruin contains 1 loot chest entity with randomized items (Blueprint, JournalPage, or resources)
Ruins are visually distinct from regular buildings (darker stone color, partially broken)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add spawn_ruin function in world/mod.rs. Generate small template-based structure with RuinTile components and a LootChest entity.

userStories.title: Abandoned campsite points of interest
userStories.description: As a player, I want to find abandoned campsites with leftover supplies so that exploration is rewarding.
acceptanceCriteria: Campsite POI spawns a campfire and 1-2 supply crates in a small cleared area
Supply crates drop random low-tier items when gathered (food, tools, rope)
Campsites spawn at ~0.5% probability per chunk in Forest and Coastal biomes
Campsite entities use ChunkObject for proper loading/unloading
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add SupplyCrate WorldObjectType. spawn_campsite function places crate objects + a decorative campfire sprite.

userStories.title: Tool tier requirements for gathering
userStories.description: As a player, I want harder resources to require better tools so that tool progression matters.
acceptanceCriteria: IronVein requires at least a StonePickaxe or better to gather (no wood/bare hands)
AncientRuin requires at least an IronPickaxe or better
CrystalNode requires at least a StonePickaxe
Gathering without the right tool shows a HUD message: 'Need better pickaxe'
Gathering speed is 50% faster with tool one tier above minimum
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add tool_tier() to ItemType (0=hand, 1=wood, 2=stone, 3=iron, 4=steel, 5=ancient). Add min_tool_tier to WorldObjectType. Check in gather_resources.

userStories.title: Enemy health bars
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see enemy health bars so that I know how much damage I'm dealing.
acceptanceCriteria: Each enemy renders a small health bar sprite above its main sprite
Health bar shows red (damage) and green (remaining) proportional to health/max_health
Health bar is only visible when enemy health < max_health (hidden at full HP)
Boss enemies show a larger health bar with their name
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Spawn child entities with Sprite for health bar background and fill. Update in a new update_enemy_health_bars system.

userStories.title: Camera zoom levels
userStories.description: As a player, I want to zoom the camera in and out so that I can see more of the world or focus on details.
acceptanceCriteria: Scroll wheel or +/- keys cycle between 3 zoom levels: close (0.5x), normal (1.0x), far (2.0x)
Camera zoom uses Bevy's OrthographicProjection scale
Current zoom level persists during gameplay
Minimap position adjusts correctly at all zoom levels
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add zoom_level field to camera system. Handle scroll input. Modify OrthographicProjection.scale. Adjust minimap offset calculation.

userStories.title: Gathering progress indicator
userStories.description: As a player, I want visual feedback showing gathering progress instead of objects just disappearing.
acceptanceCriteria: While gathering (holding left click on object), a progress bar shows above the object
Progress bar fills proportionally as object health decreases
Object sprite shrinks slightly as health decreases (scale to 0.7 at 0 HP)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add GatheringProgress component spawned as child entity of WorldObject being gathered. Update sprite scale in gather_resources.

userStories.title: Pause menu with controls reference
userStories.description: As a player, I want a pause menu that shows controls and lets me save/quit.
acceptanceCriteria: Escape key toggles a pause menu overlay
Game time and systems pause while menu is open (Time<Virtual> paused)
Menu shows: Resume, Save Game, Controls Reference, Quit buttons
Controls reference lists all keybindings
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add PauseState resource. Escape toggles. Guard gameplay systems with run_if(not(paused)). Render menu text in HUD.

userStories.title: Day counter and time display polish
userStories.description: As a player, I want a cleaner time display showing the current day, time of day as a clock, and season.
acceptanceCriteria: Day/night indicator shows sun/moon icon text (Day: SUN, Night: MOON, etc.)
Time displays as approximate hour (6AM, 12PM, 9PM) instead of raw percentage
Season shows day X of Y in current season
Weather indicator more visible with distinct text colors per weather type
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Update update_hud to format time_of_day as 24h clock. Add season day counter. Color weather text.

userStories.title: Performance: chunk image caching
userStories.description: As a developer, I want chunk terrain images to be cached so that regenerating chunks on reload is faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Chunk terrain images are only regenerated when the chunk is first created, not on every manage_chunks cycle
When a chunk is unloaded and reloaded, its image is regenerated from seed (not cached to disk)
The generate_chunk call in spawn_chunk_objects is removed (chunk data reused from the spawned Chunk component)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: spawn_chunk_objects currently calls generator.generate_chunk again redundantly. Pass the already-generated chunk data instead.

userStories.title: Performance: spatial hash for entity queries
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a spatial hash grid for nearby-entity lookups so that combat and gathering don't iterate all entities.
acceptanceCriteria: SpatialGrid resource divides world into 64px cells tracking entity positions
Enemy queries in player_attack use spatial grid to find nearby enemies instead of iterating all
Gathering queries in gather_resources use spatial grid for nearby objects
Grid updates every frame based on Transform changes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add SpatialGrid resource with HashMap<(i32,i32), Vec<Entity>>. Update in a system. Query grid cell + neighbors for nearby entities.
